title: Sword of Light applies Hit, Atk, and dice bonuses while equipped

card.rawText: Hit: +3. Atk: +3. Atk Dice Rolls: +1. Hit Dice Rolls: +1.

effect.value: Hit +3; Atk +3; Atk Dice Rolls +1; Hit Dice Rolls +1

plan.title: Sword of Light applies Hit, Atk, and dice bonuses while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Sword of Light to a modifier-zero primary creature, run a battle, and verify flat bonuses plus extra hit and attack dice.

notes: Place test_primary_creature_mod_0 on player_1 field as primary so modifiers come only from Sword of Light.

steps: Player 1 plays Sword of Light and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect hit dice, attack dice, hit modifier, and damage dealt.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +3 Atk bonus
Sword of Light remains equipped/on field

manualVerification: Confirm the extra Hit Dice Roll is also shown in battle UI.
riskNotes: This fixture covers the shared APPLY_MULTI_MODIFIER route and effective attack dice count; hit dice count may need a more explicit assertion path later.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Sword of Light's multi modifier while equipped.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
